metadata.description: Offensive-security skill bundles for Claude Code by ElementalSoul.

plugins.name: claude-bughunter
plugins.description: 71-skill bug-hunting & external red-team bundle — 48 hunt-* web/vuln-class + framework skills, enterprise platform attack chains (M365/Entra, Okta, SharePoint, vCenter, SSL-VPN, APK), recon/OSINT, reporting & validation gates, Burp MCP integration. Skills auto-load by topic; 15 slash commands.
